Flex5,Flex6,Ledger,Co,TP,TPname,Flex2,GL,GLdesc,Flex1,Flex4,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex3,YearPeriod,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,FSitemDesc,Flex7,Flex8
Elim Nbr,Elim Name,Ledger,Co,TP,TP Name,TP Grp,GL,GL Desc,GL Grp,Stmt Grp,PC,PC Desc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,View,As Of,YTD Amt,ITD Amt,QTD Amt,FS Item Desc,Elim (Yes/No),reg/est or other
Ledger,Flex5,Co,GL
update TransX set Contract = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'YE EQU ROLL'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY, Amt2,Amt4,Amt5,Flex6) (select KeyID, YearPeriod, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4, round(sum(Amt5),2) as Amt5,'' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt2 = 0 and amt4 = 0 and amt5 = 0

update TransX set Amt4 = Amt2, Amt5 = Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '3%' and (TTY = '100' or not GL like '%2') and not GL = '3584005' and not PC in ('141CPW0000','141SCP0000','141QUE0000','141SAB0000','141SBG0000')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,5) in ('19999','28999','28980','28989','19989')
update TransX set Flex5 = '200', Flex6 = 'interim/fh balances - needs further review' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and substring(GL,1,5) in ('28510','35925')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '8000000' and Co = '2999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,5) in ('11448','11449','11456','11457','11478','11455') or GL = '1145403') and Ledger = 'US'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(2) Elim' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('1999','2999','3999')
update TransX set Flex3 = '(1) Co2Co' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Co' + Co + ' Tp' + TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set Flex1 = Descr, Flex4 = Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,2) = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL Grp 4'
update TransX set Amt1 = round(Amt2-Amt5,2), Amt3 = round(Amt2-Amt4,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt1 = 0, Amt3 = 0 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('810','815')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0 and amt3 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,TP,TPname,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,PK) (select KeyID,YearPeriod,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,TP,TPname,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '99' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,YearPeriod,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,TP,TPname,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0 and amt3 = 0

update TransX set Flex5 = '200', Flex6 = 'interim/fh balances - needs further review' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and GL in ('1621502','2421502','2850500','2850998','2850996','4398014')
update TransX set Flex5 = '200', Flex6 = 'interim/fh balances - needs further review' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and substring(GL,1,5) in ('28510','35925')
update TransX set Flex5 = '131', Flex6 = 'Dividend Payments' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '3620001' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = 42 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2300' and Co <= '2450' and TP = '2008' and Contract like 'DAH%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 42 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP >= '2300' and TP <= '2450' and Contract in ('32400','DAH')
update TransX set Flex5 = 42 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and Contract like 'DAH%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 41 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP >= '2300' and TP <= '2450' and PC = '1402000101'
update TransX set Flex5 = 41 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '2300' and Co <= '2450' and TP = '2008' and PC = '4050100250'
update TransX set Flex5 = 8 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and substring(Contract,1,2) = 'AH' and tp <> '2310'

update TransX set Flex5 = 1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and PC in ('220CSIC000','221CSIC000','341CSIC000') and Co in ('2001','2002','2003','2200','2999') and TP in ('2001','2002','2003','2200') and not (Contract like 'ORB QS%' or Contract like 'ORESA P%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3270' and TP = '3030' and Contract like 'CY0200__A'
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '3270' and Contract like 'SYB__095630A'
update TransX set Flex5 = 21 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3999' and (Contract like 'NGNLCYB%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2007' and TP = '3030'
update TransX set Flex5 = 3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2007'
update TransX set Flex5 = 3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and (Contract like 'LA SYND%' or PC = '1428190817')
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2001' and TP >= '3030' and TP <= '3075' and PC like '6%'
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co >= '3030' and Co <= '3075' and TP = '2001' and PC = '3991051101'
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '3030' and TP = '2001' and PC in ('3990000000','3991050801','5500000000','39910615HO')
update TransX set Flex5 = 5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and (Contract like 'FIRV LB%' or PC = '6413270317')
update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP in ('2300','2400','2450') and substring(PC,1,1) = '6'
update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co in ('2300','2400','2450','2201') and TP = '2008' and substring(Contract,1,3) = 'FV-'
update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and (substring(Contract,1,7) = 'FIRV ST' or substring(Contract,1,3) =  'FV-') and tp <> '2310'

update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and TP in ('2300','2400','2450','2008') and substring(PC,1,1) ='6' and not (substring(Contract,1,7) = 'FIRV ST' or substring(Contract,1,3) =  'FV-')

update TransX set Flex5 = 6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and PC = '6059000000' and not len(TP) = 4  and not (substring(Contract,1,7) = 'FIRV ST' or substring(Contract,1,3) =  'FV-') and tp <> '2310'

update TransX set Flex5 = 35 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and TP = '2210' and PC in ('220ORB0000','221ORB0000','341ORB0000')
update TransX set Flex5 = 44 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2310' and PC in ('6600000200','6600000300')
update TransX set Flex5 = 44 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2310' and TP = '2006' and substring(Contract,1,2) = 'FV'
update TransX set Flex5 = 44 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and substring(contract,1,7) = 'HCN CAF'
update TransX set Flex5 = 33 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2310' and TP = '2006'
update TransX set Flex5 = 33 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2310'

update TransX set Flex5 = 921 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2200' and Contract = '54'
update TransX set Flex5 = 921 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and (Contract like 'CB CSIC%' or Contract like 'CB GIC%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 922 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2008' and Contract = 'R6'
update TransX set Flex5 = 922 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2008' and TP = '2200' and Contract = '32171'
update TransX set Flex5 = 922 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and (Contract like 'CSIC SC%' or Contract like 'GIC SC%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 923 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2200' and TP = '2006' and Contract in ('TR911','BULK099')
update TransX set Flex5 = 923 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2006' and TP = '2200' and Contract = '58'
update TransX set Flex5 = 923 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL and Co = '2999' and (Contract like 'CB2 CSIC%' or Contract like 'CB2 GIC%')
update TransX set Flex6 = e.ShortName from TransX t inner join Eliminations e on t.Flex5 = e.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'RRP', Flex6 = 'RRP and CLRF reclasses' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Contract in ('RRP Reclass','CLRF')
update TransX set Flex6 = 'CRC Canada (old)' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '104'
update TransX set Flex5 = '101', Flex6 = 'Investments Related' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and GL like '32100%'
update TransX set Flex5 = '101', Flex6 = 'Investments Related' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and substring(GL,1,3) in ('114','344')

update TransX set Flex5 = '4a', Flex6 = 'ORH Loan' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and (Co = '2999' and GL = '1320000' and Contract = 'R/E') or Contract like '67612%' or GL in ('1290500','3584000','3584000')
update TransX set Flex5 = '103', Flex6 = 'Tax' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and substring(GL,1,3) in ('172','261')
update TransX set Flex5 = '7a', Flex6 = 'NICL QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex5,'') <> '7' and Co = '2999' and Contract like 'NICL LB%'
update TransX set Flex5 = '999', Flex6 = 'ORB QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co in ('2002','2999') and TP = '2210' and (Contract = 'AR509' or PC = '2202FR0721')
update TransX set Flex5 = '39a', Flex6 = 'STM ORB' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co = '2210' and TP = '4110' and Contract = 'BB104'
update TransX set Flex5 = '7a', Flex6 = 'NICL QS' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = '777'
update TransX set Flex5 = '112', Flex6 = 'cash accounts should not have TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4398002' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = 'Sched F', Flex6 = 'Adj for Sched F (OK)' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Contract = 'SCHED F'

update TransX set Flex5 = '999', Flex6 = 'Proposed write-off' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co = '2999' and (TP like 'F%' or TP = '2101' or Contract like 'HSC CAD%' or Contract in ('2300-2101','HUD 2102','ORB PB 2002','ORB PB 2210','HUD MISC'))
update TransX set Flex1 = '02 RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('02 RCR','04 ALAE') and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex1 = '02 RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('02 RCR','04 ALAE') and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex1 = '26 Chg RCR & ALAE' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('26 Chg RCR','28 Chg ALAE') and Flex5 = '8'
update TransX set Flex3 = '(3) Commonwealth' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract like 'COW%' and Flex3 = '(1) Co2Co' and Flex5 = '8'

update TransX set Flex5 = '100', Flex6 = 'Misc - Non UW related IC Transactions' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 = 0 and Flex5 is NULL and upper(substring(contract,1,7)) not in ('FV-EUCL','HCN CAF') and TP <> 'F0001'
update TransX set Flex5 = '111', Flex6 = 'no arrangement between 2002 and 2003' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Co = '2002' and TP = '2003') or (Co = '2003' and TP = '2002')) and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '112', Flex6 = 'cash accounts should not have TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '10%' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '114', Flex6 = 'co 2008 tp 3030 only for contracts 593 and OACN16600 - others should be written off' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and TP = '3030' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '115', Flex6 = 'co 2006 tp 2008 has no arrangement - should be written off' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP = '2008' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '116', Flex6 = 'co 2007 tp 2400/2450 only has Pontus - others should have TP removed' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2007' and TP in ('2400','2450') and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '117', Flex6 = 'co 2300/2400/2450 should not have TPs between themselves' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2300','2400','2450') and TP in ('2300','2400','2450') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '7a', Flex6 = 'NICL QS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('3070','3075') and TP = '2001' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '119', Flex6 = '1. change Tp to 2200 or 2. change contract to OR5 or 3. write-off' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '4110' and TP = '2008' and Contract = 'OR2' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '120', Flex6 = 'TP should be 3070' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2300' and TP = '3030' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '121', Flex6 = 'Fixed Assets between co 1000, 2005, 2008 - Ok since nets to NIL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1915007' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = 'G90', Flex6 = 'This contract should not have a TP, but it does, so we post G90 quarterly to correct' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Contract = 'FC0000293' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '123', Flex6 = 'UK Settlement - Cleared' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1935996','1935998','1938205') and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '125', Flex6 = 'e-mail sent to Neepa to clear the balance' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3270' and TP = '2001' and GL in ('2319900','2319998','2399998','3590902') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '100', Flex6 = 'Misc - Non UW related IC Transactions' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP = '2400' and GL like '4397%' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '127', Flex6 = 'need to reclass PC to 4070200195' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2006' and TP = '2300' and PC = '4070200194' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '128', Flex6 = 'need to clear balances where 2002 cedes to 2008' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2002' and TP = '2008' and PC = '2202EU0721' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '123', Flex6 = 'UK Settlement - Cleared' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('3592202','4398001','3573002') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '130', Flex6 = 'UW contracts related CTA Balances in Co.2999' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and GL like '359%' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '132', Flex6 = 'Retained Earnings' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '361%' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '100', Flex6 = 'Misc - Non UW related IC Transactions' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and TP = '2006' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '134', Flex6 = 'Co 2999 1320000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and GL = '1320000' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '101', Flex6 = 'Investments Related' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2999' and (GL like '3%' or GL like '119%') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '100', Flex6 = 'Misc - Non UW related IC Transactions' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2450' and TP = '3070' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '136', Flex6 = 'check if any arrangement between 3270 and 3075 - else clear' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Co = '3075' and TP = '3270') or (Co = '3270' and TP = '3075')) and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '100', Flex6 = 'Misc - Non UW related IC Transactions' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '2210' and PC like '%CSIC000' and Flex5 is NULL

update TransX set Flex5 = '138', Flex6 = 'need to investigate small non-2999 FX balances and clear' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co = '2999' and Flex1 like '9%' and upper(substring(contract,1,7)) not in ('FV-EUCL','HCN CAF') and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '12a', Flex6 = 'need to investigate if this should be part of Elim#12' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '1290500' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '101', Flex6 = 'Investments Related' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '4268702' and Flex5 is NULL
update TransX set Flex5 = '999', Flex6 = 'Proposed write-off' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is Null and Co = '2999' and TP = '2006' and Contract = 'UNKNOWN'

update TransX set Flex8 = (case when (substring(GL,4,4) in ('9900','9901') or GL in ('1320000','1320500','1321500','2025001','2035001')) and GL < '4000000' then 'reg/est' else 'other' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex7 = (case when Co = '2999' or Co = '3999' then 'Yes' else 'No' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update t set FSitemDesc = f.FSitemDesc from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL inner join Fsitems f on c.Fsitem = f.fsitem where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set pc = '3413290863' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 in ('30','40') and pc = '3414300272'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'zzz', Flex6 = 'unassigned' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'zzz' and TP = 'F0001'

insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,TP,TPname,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,PK) (select KeyID,YearPeriod,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,TP,TPname,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '98' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID,YearPeriod,Ledger,Co,GL,GLdesc,FSitemDesc,TP,TPname,PC,PCdesc,Hierarchy,BusCat,Contract,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7,Flex8)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PK = '98'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and amt1 = 0 and amt2 = 0 and amt3 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex5,Flex6) (select distinct KeyID,Flex5,Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,YearPeriod,FSitemDesc,GLdesc,Period,Date1,Flex1,Qtr,Date2,Flex2,Yr,Flex3) (select '[batchID]-data3',e.ID, e.ShortName, e.Def, max(p1.VerNbr), max(p1.Finished), substring(max(right('00'+convert(varchar,p1.VerNbr),2) + p1.RunBy),3,99), max(p2.VerNbr), max(p2.Finished), substring(max(right('00'+convert(varchar,p2.VerNbr),2) + p2.RunBy),3,99), max(coalesce(p4.VerNbr,0)), max(p3.Comments) from Eliminations e left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Recon') p1 on p1.ID = e.ID left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Elim' and len(ID) < 3) p2 on p2.ID = e.ID left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Comments') p3 on p3.ID = e.ID left join (select ID, VerNbr, Finished, RunBy, Comments from ProcessTracker where SubID = '[Yr][Mo]' and RunMode = 'Elim' and Comments = 'y') p4 on p4.ID = e.ID where right('000'+convert(varchar,e.ID),3) < '050' group by e.ID, e.ShortName, e.Def)
insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, BusCat, Contract, PC, TTY, Amt2,Amt4,Amt5) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',
